name: volcengine-cloud-firewall
description: OctoBus package for Volcengine Cloud Firewall read-only query APIs.

Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.name: describe-address-book
Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.description: Query Volcengine Cloud Firewall address books.

Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.name: describe-control-policy
Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.description: Query internet boundary firewall access control policies.

Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.name: describe-vpc-firewall-acl-rule-list
Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.description: Query VPC firewall access control policies.

Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.name: describe-nat-firewall-control-policy
Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.description: Query NAT firewall access control policies.

Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.name: describe-dns-control-policy
Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.description: Query domain blacklist access control policies.

Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.name: query-user-alarm-config
Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.description: Query Cloud Firewall alarm notification settings.

Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.name: invoke-read-only-action
Volcengine_Cloud_Firewall.Volcengine_Clo.description: Invoke an allowed Volcengine Cloud Firewall read-only action.
